tasks.bench: deno bench --allow-all benches/esbuild.bench.ts benches/server.bench.ts benches/tap.bench.ts benches/e2e.bench.ts
tasks.bench:check: deno run --allow-all scripts/check-benchmarks.ts --files benches/esbuild.bench.ts benches/server.bench.ts benches/tap.bench.ts benches/e2e.bench.ts benches/daemon.bench.ts
tasks.bench:update: deno run --allow-all scripts/check-benchmarks.ts --save --files benches/esbuild.bench.ts benches/server.bench.ts benches/tap.bench.ts benches/e2e.bench.ts benches/daemon.bench.ts
